result:
The cleaned and harmonized dataset has been successfully created and saved as `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`. This file contains the following variables:

- `NSID`: Cohort member identifier
- `imd15`: Area deprivation score at age 15 (with standardized missing value codes)
- `imd16`: Area deprivation score at age 16 (with standardized missing value codes)
- `imd32`: Area deprivation score at age 32 (with standardized missing value codes)

The dataset includes standardized missing value codes:
- -9: Refusal
- -8: Don't know/insufficient information
- -3: Not asked/not interviewed
- -2: Script error/information lost
- -1: Not applicable

All variables are numeric continuous values with appropriate labels for missing value codes.
